### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security')

## EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadataCarrier Class

Centralized read, write, and validation helpers for protection metadata stored in EventStore envelope extensions\.

```csharp
public static class EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadataCarrier
```

### Fields

| Field | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `ExtensionKey` | The reserved extension key `eventstore.protection`\. |

### Methods

| Method | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `TryValidate(EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadata?, out string?)` | Validates version, state, lengths, ASCII-printable values, and forbidden secret-shaped fields\. |
| `Serialize(EventStorePayloadProtectionMetadata)` | Serializes validated metadata as compact JSON\. |
| `Read(string?)` | Reads serialized metadata, mapping legacy, malformed, unknown-version, unknown-field, and forbidden shapes deterministically\. |
| `Read(IReadOnlyDictionary<string,string>?)` | Reads metadata from an envelope extension dictionary\. |
| `Write(...)` | Returns an extension dictionary with the canonical protection metadata key stamped\. |
| `Legacy()` | Returns the explicit legacy compatibility metadata record\. |
